posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title:
Cheers erupted in Norfolk as sailors aboard the USS Gerald R. Ford reunited with their families after 326 days at sea.

The carrier returned home following the longest U.S. aircraft carrier deployment since the Vietnam War era.
